tables.description: Customer engagement metrics across email, push notifications, in-app messages, campaigns, and rewards

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier (primary key across all feature groups)

columns.name: email_open_rate
columns.description: Fraction of marketing emails opened (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: push_notification_ctr
columns.description: Push notification click-through rate (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: in_app_msg_response_rate
columns.description: In-app message response rate (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: campaign_participation_count
columns.description: Number of marketing campaigns participated in

columns.name: reward_redemption_rate
columns.description: Fraction of available rewards redeemed (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: feedback_submissions
columns.description: Number of feedback forms submitted

columns.name: nps_score
columns.description: Net Promoter Score (0-10, higher is better)

columns.name: days_since_last_engagement
columns.description: Days since last engagement activity

columns.name: engagement_trend
columns.description: Recent engagement direction: increasing, stable, or declining

columns.name: retention_flag
columns.description: Binary retention indicator: 1 = retained, 0 = churned

columns.name: event_time
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO-8601 format (used by Feature Store for versioning)

tables.description: Customer interaction history with the behavioral platform including logins, sessions, lessons, nudges, and chat usage

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier (primary key across all feature groups)

columns.name: total_logins_30d
columns.description: Total number of logins in the last 30 days

columns.name: avg_session_duration_min
columns.description: Average session duration in minutes over last 30 days

columns.name: lessons_completed
columns.description: Number of financial literacy lessons completed

columns.name: nudges_received
columns.description: Number of behavioral nudges sent to the customer

columns.name: nudges_acted_on
columns.description: Number of nudges the customer acted on

columns.name: chat_interactions
columns.description: Number of AI chat interactions in last 30 days

columns.name: last_login_days_ago
columns.description: Days since last login (0 = today)

columns.name: feature_usage_breadth
columns.description: Fraction of app features used (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: mobile_usage_pct
columns.description: Percentage of sessions from mobile device (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: peak_usage_hour
columns.description: Hour of day with most activity (0-23)

columns.name: event_time
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO-8601 format (used by Feature Store for versioning)

tables.description: Customer financial performance metrics including spending, credit utilization, balances, and retention target

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier (primary key across all feature groups)

columns.name: avg_transaction_amount
columns.description: Average transaction amount in USD

columns.name: monthly_spend
columns.description: Total monthly spend in USD

columns.name: payment_on_time_rate
columns.description: Fraction of payments made on time (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: credit_utilization
columns.description: Credit utilization ratio (0.0 to 1.0, lower is better)

columns.name: account_age_months
columns.description: Number of months since account was opened

columns.name: num_products
columns.description: Number of financial products held by customer

columns.name: avg_balance
columns.description: Average account balance in USD

columns.name: min_balance
columns.description: Minimum account balance in USD over period

columns.name: max_balance
columns.description: Maximum account balance in USD over period

columns.name: target
columns.description: Binary retention label: 1 = retained/active, 0 = churned/at-risk (ground truth for ML)

columns.name: event_time
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO-8601 format (used by Feature Store for versioning)

tables.description: ML-derived predictive scores and customer segmentation attributes

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique customer identifier (primary key across all feature groups)

columns.name: churn_risk_score
columns.description: ML-predicted probability of churning (0.0 to 1.0, higher = more likely to churn)

columns.name: lifetime_value_estimate
columns.description: Estimated customer lifetime value in USD

columns.name: engagement_score
columns.description: Composite engagement score (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: satisfaction_index
columns.description: Customer satisfaction score (1.0 to 5.0)

columns.name: propensity_to_upgrade
columns.description: Likelihood of upgrading to premium product (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: digital_adoption_score
columns.description: Digital feature adoption level (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: support_ticket_frequency
columns.description: Average support tickets per month

columns.name: referral_likelihood
columns.description: Likelihood of referring others (0.0 to 1.0)

columns.name: segment_code
columns.description: Customer segment: premium, standard, or basic

columns.name: risk_tier
columns.description: Risk classification: low, medium, high, or critical

columns.name: event_time
columns.description: Event timestamp in ISO-8601 format (used by Feature Store for versioning)
